tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check runtime health and subsystem status

tools.name: click_mouse
tools.description: Click at coordinates, optionally targeting a named window

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type text or send named keys to a window

tools.name: analyze_screen
tools.description: CV/OCR analysis of current screen (requires sidecar)

tools.name: wait_for_window
tools.description: Wait for a window by title to appear

tools.name: query_trace_events
tools.description: Query input trace events by layer

tools.name: session_status
tools.description: Get current session ID and state
